name: @clearline/domain-developer
description: Pure, framework-agnostic Developer-settings rules (US-CW-041): API-key masking + scope catalog + scope checks, webhook URL (HTTPS-only) validation, the event catalog, the failed-delivery retry schedule, and the static HMAC-SHA256 verification reference. No data-access or UI dependencies.

metadata.scope: Domain lib for EPIC-CW-022 (US-CW-041 Developer Settings — API Keys & Webhooks).
